prestazioni: Upgrade the 2.5L A25A-FXS inline-4 hybrid powertrain with a HKS Super Power Flow Reloaded air intake (part #15016-AK002) and a custom TOMs ECU flash (Stage 2 Hybrid Boost) to optimize the 215 PS + 163 Nm electric motor synergy, targeting a 20% transient response improvement in Sport+ mode

Install a custom MagnaFlow 14815 cat-back exhaust system with 3.5" dual outlets and resonated mid-pipes to complement the A25A-FXS’s Atkinson cycle tuning, reducing backpressure by 18% while retaining OEM hybrid EV mode NVH compliance

Fit a set of D2 Racing coilovers (part #D2-TY01-15-SL) with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs, adjustable 30-way damping, and 40mm drop for the Crown’s TNGA-K platform, paired with Whiteline front sway bars (24mm hollow, part #BKR97X) to mitigate understeer in high-speed hybrid torque vectoring
estetica: Apply a full Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (part #LB-TOYOTA-CROWN-RS) with carbon fiber fenders, extended rockers, and a 30mm rear overfender lip to accommodate 20x9.5" ET35 Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (bronze, 245/35R20 tires) without rubbing in full compression

Replace the OEM LED taillights with a set of custom Valenti CNC-machined sequential LED units (part #VALENTI-TOYOTA-CROWN-RS) featuring a 12-LED dynamic turn signal and a hybrid battery charge indicator integrated into the inner housing

Install a Seibon Carbon fiber hood (part #CF-TOY-CROWN-RS-HOOD) with a 30mm vented scoop to duct air to the HKS intercooler (hybrid-specific, part #15004-AK003) while reducing weight by 4.2kg, paired with a custom Vortex Generator set (3M 4011 tape) on the roof for aero stability at 180+ km/h
